stemHtml: A student pilot with no instrument qualification is on his first cross-country flight. During the flight they encounter poor visibility but with intermittent patches where they can see the ground. Which of the following statement is correct?

options.a: They should continue to fly VFR and focus on the areas where it is possible to see the ground.
options.b: They should rely on the aircraft instruments and leave the poor visibility conditions.
options.c: They should rely on the "seat of the pants" sense because it is reliable in poor visibility conditions.
options.d: They should continue in accordance with the flight plan because the weather should improve in a short time if the flight has been planned correctly.
